name: Security Software Discovery Process Detected
description: Detects an adversary attempting to discover security software installed on a system. This is a common **Discovery** technique used to identify and evade defensive tools.

prompts.prompt: An alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a process, **{process}**, was executed with a command line (**{command}**) to discover security software. This is a strong indicator of **Discovery** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1518**), where an adversary is attempting to map the system's defenses. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to secure the affected host. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: process
parameters.description: The name of the process that performed the action.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line that was executed.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
